mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, phase_code, task_name, task_type, description, default_days, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM project_template_task WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY phase_code, id
mapper.update: UPDATE project_template_task SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE template_id = #{templateId} AND deleted = 0
